Configuration¶

Marc21 converter

invenio_records_marc21.config.MARC21_BASE_TEMPLATE = 'invenio_records_marc21/base.html'¶

Default base template for the demo page.

invenio_records_marc21.config.MARC21_DEFAULT_VALUE = 'foobar'¶

Default value for the application.
